title: Oracle Analytics Cloud: AI Data Agents for Enterprise Analytics
summary: Oracle Analytics Cloud March 2026 update introduces AI Data Agents — purpose-built AI assistants that work with specific datasets and contextual documents (HR policies, contracts, compliance). Agents answer questions using both data and organizational business context.

title: Oracle + NVIDIA at GTC 2026: GPU-Accelerated Vector Search in Oracle AI Database 26ai
summary: At NVIDIA GTC 2026 (March 18), Oracle unveiled GPU-accelerated vector index generation in Oracle AI Database 26ai using NVIDIA cuVS. Also showcased: NeMo Agent Toolkit integration for enterprise AI agents.

title: Oracle Launches 22 Fusion Agentic Applications at AI World London
summary: At Oracle AI World in London on March 24, 2026, Oracle announced 22 new Fusion Agentic Applications — enterprise apps powered by AI agents for finance, HR, and supply chain. AI Agent Studio is free for Fusion Applications customers.

title: Oracle Private Agent Factory: No-Code AI Agent Platform for 26ai
summary: Oracle announced Private Agent Factory — a no-code AI agent builder for Oracle AI Database 26ai. Business analysts can build and securely deploy data-driven agents without third-party services.
